texto: And just like that,the cloth was torn. was it the days, weeks of the same argument was it the months without affection, or was it simply the year and a half wasted on empty promises from both sides?I don't know what ripped it, but here I sit with my needle and thread trying to fix it knowing it will never look as beautiful as it did when we first started weaving it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brittany Swanson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “And just like that,the cloth was torn. was it the days, weeks of the same argument was it the mon…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, emotion, heartache pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de heartache e love.
